[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010101 3
1 11000000 2
2 01011100 4
3 11111011 7
4 10110111 6
5 11000010 3
6 01111100 5
7 11111011 7

67 76 11110010 5
70 07 11110011 6

13 31 01011101 5
24 42 11111011 7 match 3 7
35 53 11111111 a

61 16 11010111 6
72 27 11110000 4

37 73 01111100 5 match 6
